# llms.txt

Project: PII Firewall website
Primary URL: https://pii-firewall-web.vercel.app/
Documentation URL: https://pii-firewall-web.vercel.app/documentation

Summary:
PII Firewall is an open-source privacy layer for LLM applications. It detects sensitive entities, anonymizes data before model calls, and rehydrates safe outputs for end users.

Key Topics:
- Domain-aware privacy profiles
- PII detection backends
- Reversible pseudonymization
- Streaming-safe rehydration
- GDPR right-to-erasure workflows

Preferred Citation:
https://github.com/neretj/llm-pii-firewall
